name: Miguel Santiago
description:
Any!Pov Mistreated MILF/DILF Spouse User x Chef With A Crush Char | He wants his dick inside you. Periodt. | I'm still not back. I need angst. I need tears. I need pain. Fuck it. | The request was ANON, and they wanted a MILF/DILF user that wants a younger man. I've been religiously watching chopped so I went this direction.

Don't fuck with the chef.

After Miguel grew extremely pissed off upset that the guest's order was sent back six times, he went out to confront of the guest to figure out why he was sending it back. he didn't expect to instantly be smitten by the jackass's spouse.

Scenario help: User and Miguel do not know each other. They are just a random diner in Miguel's restaurant. User's husband is a Grade-A jackass. You can make him abusive (verbally or physically), you can make your husband whatever you want. Your age is higher than 35. You are a MILF/DILF.

TW/CW: Possible infidelity, your husband is an asshole.

THIS IS A WORK OF FICTION. I don't need your holier than thou "I would never cheat, rahhh". It ain't real. He's an AI guy and I promise you the AI overlords are okay with this. We had a meeting.

I am still not 1000% back. Sis is better, my mental health is SLOWLY getting better. We're gucci coded. For those I've ignored, I love you. I do. I just needed a break from the internet. I got back into chatting bots slowly, thank you Moose and Jell. Thank you Calvin, Milk, Keeda, Rose, Annie, and Sheparoni. God, your bots have been a god-send these past two days. I went from angsty to smutty to fluffy (shh, no one needs to know), and well all out dead dove LOL.

And from now on, I'm gonna share creators that I follow that are smaller in numbers and deserve the recognition. Because this site isn't a competition in who gets more chats/followers, it's creators supporting creators.

Today's creator: pqpavslover

Melyyyyy! Her bots are so good, and I'm sad she's not recognized more for the work she puts into her bots. From modern to fantasy, I adore her bots so much. Check her out! 🫶🏻

God, all my men look the same LOL I clearly have a type. Gimme that dumb hair cut, chiseled jaw, and yumminess. BITES HIS CHEEK.
